# Verifiedly

> One link-in-bio for creators, athletes, and brands to monetize with tips, subscriptions, digital products, affiliates, and sponsorships. Payouts powered by Stripe. Keep up to 100% of every sale.

Verifiedly gives creators a single shareable profile (verifiedly.app/username) that bundles every revenue stream — paid links, gated content, subscription tiers, one-off digital product sales, fan tips, and brand-deal applications — with funds routed directly to the creator's bank via Stripe Connect. Free plan keeps 90% of sales; Pro keeps 95%; Elite keeps 100%.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing.
- [Explore](/explore): Browse verified creators, digital products, and subscription tiers.
- [Pricing](/#pricing): Free, Pro ($4.99/mo, 5% fee), and Elite ($19.99/mo, 0% fee) plans.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a creator, business, or fan account.
- [Log in](/login): Returning user sign-in.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Legal terms for using Verifiedly.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How creator and fan data is handled.
- [Refund Policy](/refunds): Refund eligibility and process for digital purchases.

## Optional

- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Password reset request.
